subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में किस मंगल के बाहर है।
explanation_en:
Dumba Fort, also known as Kumbhalgarh Fort, is located outside Jodhpur.
In English, it can be explained as: The Kumbhalgarh Fort, also called Dumba Fort, is situated outside Jodhpur.
explanation_hi: Dumba Fort, also known as Kumbhalgarh Fort, is located outside Jodhpur.

question_en: Who was the founder of Jaisamand?
question_hi: जोमोलाला गती खाला गती नाती खाला गती
explanation_en: Sirohi was the founder of Jaisamand.
explanation_hi: सिरोमोला गती खाला गती नाती खाला गती

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the founder of Udaipur?
explanation_en: Ala Singh was the founder of Udaipur.
